body.title: Corpus saturates at deepseek-r1:32b — add a frontier band, or capability rank has no evidence above the local box
body.description:
PREREQUISITE for T-inference-cost-first-sort-strands-cloud-fleet.

Measured 2026-07-09: deepseek-r1:32b clears every band of the corpus (b1 3/3, b2 3/3, b3 3/3, b4 3/3). The instrument saturates at the top of the LOCAL ladder. A capability rank derived from this corpus therefore cannot place claude-opus-4.8 or deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud ABOVE deepseek-r1:32b — there is no query on which they differ.

Consequence: the fix for the cost-first sort ('escalation walks a measured capability rank; cost only breaks ties WITHIN a rank') cannot be proven. Its whole claim is that escalating past the top local rung reaches a strictly more capable stack. With a saturated corpus that claim has no evidence, and asserting it would be exactly the hollow green this project exists to prevent.

WORK: add band b5_frontier — queries with deterministic, checkable answers that require search or case-analysis beyond a 32b reasoning model. Then MEASURE: deepseek-r1:32b (owned_local) vs deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud (subscription, sunk cost) and gemini-2.5-flash (free_throttled). anthropic is DOWN on this box, so no token_direct measurement today.

The band is defined by the SHAPE of the reasoning, as every band is — not by 'the band the 32b fails'. If the 32b clears b5 too, that is data: harden again. Do NOT tune queries until a chosen model fails; that fits the instrument to the answer.

**Test plan:** red->green, hermetic. RED: `by_band('b5_frontier')` is empty. GREEN: b5 is populated, every query's verifier accepts each declared phrasing and rejects its confabulation (both existing corpus tests extend to it automatically). The LIVE separation (32b fails, a cloud model passes) is recorded as DATA in the memory store — never as a green assertion, since it reaches real providers.

**Decision:** decision:D-domains-general-with-device-owned-specializations-2026-07-08

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: b5_frontier added: 4 queries, every ground truth brute-forced before entering the corpus. Proven: proofs/cc.0.frontier-band-separates-the-local-box-fr...20260709.110706125131.json (red=AssertionError -> green=passed). MEASURED separation: deepseek-r1:32b 3/4 (genuine fail on b5-frobenius: answers 23, truth 43, finish=stop, reproduced); deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud 4/4. gemini-2.5-flash truncates on b5-frobenius even at max_tokens=16384 -> UNMEASURED on the separating query, recorded as such, NOT as incapacity.
body.inferred_intention: I intend that model capability ranks are measured against a saturating corpus instrument where deepseek-r1:32b clears all bands, ensuring no higher-ranked models can be placed above it without differing queries.
